items.title: Weave Names Abhi Sharma as Chief Technology Officer
items.description: LEHI, Utah, August 04, 2025--Weave (NYSE: WEAV), a leading all-in-one customer experience and payments software platform for small and medium-sized healthcare businesses, today announced the appointment of Abhi Sharma as the company’s Chief Technology Officer (CTO).

items.title: John Hinshaw Joins Digile as Strategic Advisor & Mentor to Accelerate AI-Led Growth and Global Expansion
items.description: Digile, a leading digital transformation and AI solutions company headquartered in Singapore, announced the appointment of John M. Hinshaw as a Strategic Advisor. A seasoned global executive with over three decades of leadership at Fortune 100 companies - including Verizon Wireless, Boeing, Hewlett-Packard, and HSBC - Hinshaw brings a wealth of expertise in technology, operations, governance, and business transformation.

items.title: CloudMasonry Announces Salesforce Marketing Cloud Next Focused Team
items.description: CloudMasonry, a leading full-service Salesforce consulting firm, announces expanded capabilities to support Salesforce Marketing Cloud Next (MCN), Salesforce's new AI-native marketing platform.

items.title: AI SDR Market $15.01 billion by 2030 | MarketsandMarkets™
items.description: According to MarketsandMarkets™, the global AI SDR Market size is projected to reach USD 15.01 billion by 2030 from USD 4.12 billion in 2025, at a CAGR of 29.5% during the forecast period.

items.title: Did Alphabet Stock Just Become a Screaming Buy? CEO Sundar Pichai Says ‘Nearly All Gen AI Unicorns Use Google Cloud’
items.description: Alphabet’s Q2 proves AI dominance with surging cloud adoption, innovative search, and strong monetization — positioning it as an AI backbone.
